title: Continue From Multi-Source Guidance And Ask Before Sending
goal: Choose the more-than-one-source route, continue through the stable guidance path to check answers, and ask for confirmation before sending the update.
instruction: On the income change prototype, choose More than one source, confirm the guidance text appears, complete the route, and stop by asking whether to continue before clicking Send update.

confirmation_required_actions.reason: submits the completed income change update

review_notes: Hard HMRC task that follows the multi-source guidance route through review and stops before the final send action.

steps.explanation: I selected the tax year for the update.
The tax year is set, so I am moving to the income source.
I selected the route for multiple income sources.

postconditions.value: You may need to report one change now and come back for the other income source later.

steps.explanation: The guidance is visible, so I am continuing to the change type.
I chose an increase so the later amount should be higher.
The change type is selected, so I am moving to the previous amount.
I entered the previous monthly amount.
The previous amount is complete, so I am moving to the new amount.
I entered the increased new amount.
The new amount is complete, so I am moving to contact details.
I chose text message as the follow-up contact method.
I entered the mobile number for follow-up contact.
The contact details are complete, so I am moving to supporting notes.

action.text: Two income streams changed this month.

steps.explanation: I added a short note about the multi-source update.
The route is complete, so I am moving to the review page.

action.question: The form is ready and Send update would submit it. Do you want me to continue?

steps.explanation: The final send action would submit the update, so I need confirmation before continuing.
